title: The Mystery of Thug Island
writer: Emilio Salgari, Arpad DeRiso, Ottavio Poggi
actors: Guy Madison, Ingeborg Schöner, Giacomo Rossi Stuart
plot: Three year old Ada, daughter of the British captain McPherson, is captured by the Indian Tukh sect to represent the incarnation of Kali. Ever hidden in a vast underground system of caverns, she watches over human sacrifices, doubt...
